## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Arena's SEO strategy and content marketing efforts with fwd.digital team to improve traffic and conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Arena is seeing increased organic traffic (130-140 visitors/week) from AI-generated and human-written content](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Need to focus on correlating traffic increase with sign-ups/conversions](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Opportunity to implement backlink strategy and leverage outbound motion for warm outreach](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Importance of setting up proper tracking and data integration between tools (HubSpot, Mixpanel, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)

## Topics

### Current SEO Performance

  - [AI-generated content performing similarly to human-written content](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Getting 130-140 visitors per week from new content](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Content refreshes bringing in 30-40 clicks per week](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [No clear correlation yet between increased traffic and increased sign-ups](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)

### Conversion Tracking and Optimization

  - [Need to pass conversion data back to fwd.digital team](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Arena team to prioritize sharing HubSpot and Mixpanel data](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
  - [Opportunity to implement ICP scoring and lead magnet strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Focus on orienting efforts around actual sign-ups rather than just ICP models](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - ["Second screen" content identified as top-performing](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Need to create more content around successful themes](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Implement backlink acquisition strategy using automated outreach](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)

### Data Integration and Reporting

  - [Currently pulling data from multiple sources manually](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Suggestion to explore tools like Koala for better data correlation and "mission control"](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [Need for tighter cohesion between Arena and fwd.digital teams on data sharing](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)

### AI-Generated Content Concerns

  - [Josh expressed skepticism about AI-generated content based on conversations with Google and agencies](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Importance of "humanization" before publishing AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Arena to share conversion data from HubSpot and Mixpanel with fwd.digital team](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Implement tracking for correlation between traffic and sign-ups](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [Explore implementation of lead magnets as an intermediate step between traffic and sign-ups](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
  - [fwd.digital to regroup and come back with thoughts on model for expected growth and conversion](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Continue aggressive content production while focusing on refining conversion strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Consider implementing automated warm outreach based on high-intent website visits](https://fathom.video/share/ZcnKnYcJnAf149M71TkRSky5LTBsAUps?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
